title: Why Your Sleep Is Out of Sync (And the Fix)
description: Long-form YouTube explainer for women 40+ on why perimenopause disrupts sleep cycles and the stack of small changes that actually move the needle. Anchored in research, delivered as a story.
hook: Your sleep didn't break — your hormones did.

cta.text: Subscribe for the full sleep series

keyMessage: Sleep loss in your 40s is hormonal, not behavioral — and it's fixable
angle: Reframe sleep failure as biology, not willpower
